name: cashsnap_external_negative_banks_v1
description: Review registry for external label-empty negative images, including stock/public images of foreign or unknown currency, coins, cash-table clutter, and plain non-note scenes. These images may be useful background/negative data, but trainable use requires local files, source/license metadata, review evidence, and target USD/KHR absence review.

banks.source_policy: Prefer CC0/Public Domain sources with stable source_url and license_url. Do not use untracked random stock images in trainable-candidate configs; every accepted image must be local, metadata-backed, visually reviewed, and verified absent of target USD/KHR notes.
banks.blocker: No curated external images have been downloaded, licensed, reviewed, or checked against target-currency leakage yet.
